sprints.name: Self-evolution P0: handoff + trigger matrix + re-incarnation protocol
deviations: No Planner spawned: Orchestrator already holds the plan (trigger matrix was the product of the prior review session). Planner Must-triggers not satisfied.
No Generator spawned: all P0 artifacts are .md/.json (doc+config), which Orchestrator is permitted to author directly per the role constraint.

sprints.name: Self-evolution fine-tuning: startup footprint + compaction survivability
deviations: A1 (universal override relocation to global CLAUDE.md) rejected by user — template ships to other users, must stay in-repo.
Generator delegated only for .mjs scripts (vibe-checkpoint.mjs new + vibe-preflight.mjs edit). All .md/.json edits done by Orchestrator directly per role constraint.

handoff.lastActionSummary: Agent state initialized for dogfood3. self-evolution-0/1 완료 후 vibe-doctor 본 저장소는 활성 작업 없음. dogfood3는 별도 워크스페이스에서 /vibe-init으로 착수 예정 — 이 저장소 안에서 dogfood3 산출물 생성 금지.
